description: Auth0 Extend was an Auth0 extensibility product for running scripts and extensions tied to Auth0 tenants. Auth0 announced it was shutting down Extend in 2019, and current documentation references Auth0 Extensions within the broader Auth0 platform rather than an active service on auth0-extend.com.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found on auth0-extend.com; available evidence indicates Auth0 Extend was sunset and its documentation now lives under auth0.com as historical product docs rather than an active domain-specific API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI.
